title: Dates > Timeline conversion stopped working
excerpt: After several months without any issues, the conversion function is no longer working in at least one of our boards (it continues to work in others). Additionally, when I create the conversion automation to an existing b…

posts.author: dwoodcock (Deb Woodcock)
posts.cookedHtml:
After several months without any issues, the conversion function is no longer working in at least one of our boards (it continues to work in others). Additionally, when I create the conversion automation to an existing board it does not work.

Bas, I have emailed your team with details but wanted to post here as well in case anyone else may be experiencing something similar. Thanks.
